round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (Botanics' Petasites, Meta's camera analysis) to raise confidence from medium to high.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent reinforced its botanical findings with infrastructure context from other agents to maintain high confidence.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent integrated botanical and meta evidence to strengthen the case for Japan over South Korea.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent used botanical and landscape evidence to confirm the Gen 4 camera assessment and raise confidence.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the consensus across all active agents. It appropriately noted the linguistic agent's lack of evidence and weighted the strong convergence of botanical (Petasites), regulatory (road quality/edge), and meta (camera generation) evidence to confirm Japan. The elimination of South Korea and Russia was well-reasoned based on the specific infrastructure and vegetation cues.
